posts.author: itaycohen-monday.com (Itay Cohen)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey everyone,

Are you a software developer? Product manager? Help us build a better product for you!

As part of our focus on making monday.com a better tool for R&D, we want to hear your feedback.
We want to customize our product for you and learn how to improve it to answer your needs better.

Want to share your opinion? Fill out this short survey:

forms.monday.com

Software development solution feedback | monday.com forms

From requests, feedback to data collection and more. Turn your insights into action with customizable WorkForms.

Thank you in advance for your help
Itay
Software Development Solution Team

facebookSurvey1200×630 17.3 KB
